Function: __strdup

    __strdup
   
   Library: Visual Studio 1998 Release */

char * __cdecl __strdup(char *_Src)

{
  char *pcVar1;
  char *_Dest;
  
  pcVar1 = FUN_0045fff0((uint *)_Src);
  _Dest = (char *)FUN_004578e0((SIZE_T)(pcVar1 + 1));
  pcVar1 = (char *)0x0;
  if (_Dest != (char *)0x0) {
    pcVar1 = FID_conflict___mbscpy(_Dest,_Src);
  }

}
